Package com.csl.intercom.dbapi.models

Class ConnectionProtocol

    • ConnectionProtocol

      protected ConnectionProtocol(int id, String name, String description, int defaultPort, String connectionTemplateId, boolean isDynamic)

  • Method Details

    • getDefaultPort

      public int getDefaultPort()

    • isDynamic

      public boolean isDynamic()

    • fromJson

      public static ConnectionProtocol fromJson(Json json)
      Parse the JSON serialization received from DB-API.
      Parameters:
      json - The serialized connection protocol as handed by DB-API.
      Returns:
      An instance of ConnectionProtocol if the parsing was successful, null otherwise.

    • fromTemplateId

      public static ConnectionProtocol fromTemplateId(String templateId)
      Create a fake protocol from a template id. This is used to create a protocol for a connection that is not yet in the database when testing.
      Parameters:
      templateId - The template id of the protocol to create.
      Returns:
      A fake protocol.

    • getProtocolById

      public static ConnectionProtocol getProtocolById(List<ConnectionProtocol> protocols, int id)
      Get a protocol by its id from a list of protocols.
      Parameters:
      protocols - The list of protocols to search in.
      id - The id of the protocol to search for.
      Returns:
      The protocol with the given id, or null if not found.
